news.title: xMEMS sees 2027 debut for cooling chips as AI glasses, SSDs face heat limits
news.description: xMEMS Labs is preparing to move its MEMS-based µCooling technology toward commercial production in 2027, with AI glasses and data-center SSDs expected to be among the first applications as sustained AI workloads push thermal constraints beyond GPUs.

stocks.ai_explanation: TSM is related to DRAM prices as they affect the cost of AI components. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
AMD is related to AI investments as they attract attention from billionaires. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
ASML is related to AI as it manufactures photolithography tools used in chip production. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
INTC is related to AI as it invests in Marvell Technology. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
QCOM is related to AI as it is part of the Nvidia ecosystem. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
